ENC-002.message: Byte-order mark U+FEFF present in middle of file

ENC-013.message: Mixed CRLF and LF line endings

ENC-016.message: Arabic numerals replaced by Unicode look-alikes

ENC-017.message: Soft hyphen U+00AD found in source

ENC-018.message: Non-breaking hyphen U+2011 present outside URLs

ENC-019.message: Duplicate combining accents on same base glyph

ENC-023.message: NARROW NB-SPACE U+202F outside French context

TYPO-001.message: ASCII straight quotes must be curly quotes

TYPO-004.message: TeX double back-tick ``…'' not allowed; use curly quotes

TYPO-005.message: Ellipsis typed as three periods ...; use \dots

TYPO-007.message: Trailing spaces at end of line

pattern.predicate: (fun line -> let len = String.length line in len > 0 && let last = String.unsafe_get line (len - 1) in last = ' ' || last = '\t')

TYPO-008.message: Multiple consecutive blank lines (> 2) in source

TYPO-009.message: Non-breaking space ~ used incorrectly at line start

TYPO-013.message: ASCII back-tick used as opening quote

TYPO-015.message: Double percent in source; likely stray percent

TYPO-035.message: Space before French punctuation mark; use non-breaking space ~

TYPO-036.message: Suspicious consecutive capitalised words; check for inadvertent shouting

TYPO-041.message: Incorrect spacing around \ldots; check for missing space

TYPO-043.message: Smart (curly) quotes detected; verbatim sections require ASCII quotes

TYPO-047.message: Starred \section* used where numbered section expected

TYPO-048.message: En-dash character used where minus sign expected

TYPO-051.message: Thin space U+2009 found; prefer \thinspace or \, macro

TYPO-053.message: Unicode midline ellipsis U+22EF found; use \cdots instead

TYPO-055.message: Consecutive \, thin-spaces detected; collapse into single space

TYPO-058.message: Greek homograph letter found in Latin text

TYPO-061.message: Unicode multiplication sign found; prefer \times in math mode

TYPO-063.message: Non-breaking hyphen U+2011 found; use standard hyphen
